case_title: YASIN, ABDUL vs. MIRANDA, AURORA et al

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF SEP-22-1994, DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: (1) INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF HAS DIED; (2) FACTS TO STATE THAT PLAINTIFF'S SERVICE ADDRESS IS CURRENT OR LAST KNOWN; (3) COUNSEL MAY HAVE DUTY TO PERFORM EVEN IF CLIENT IS DECEASED, CLARK VS STATE BAR 39C. 2D 161, CCP 377.30.
